title: [v4.4.1-crio] CVE-2025-9566 Fixes
body:
[v4.4.1-crio] CVE-2025-9566 Fixes

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-61269

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: For this older repo, I had to add the `PodmanExitCleanly()` functions, `CITEST_IMAGE` variable, and tweak the `ExitWithError()` call in play_kube_test.go.

Linter is still not happy, I would say the test system is way to old at this point where I see little point in backporting the test case. The e2e ones are not run as part of gating anyway are they? And for QE they should be able to just run the test case of main with the binary build by the RHEL package.

@Luap99 yeah, spot on about the CI from here on down.  It's not running in general.  I was able to fix the lint issues from the first complaint, but now it's complaining further with new issues.  I'm going to drop the test commit here then and will leave it to the QE team to verify.
Thanks again @Luap99 I've removed the ` !remote` from those two files and repushed.  @cevich FYI
Well, I thought it was happy green test buttons on Friday, and it looks like it again now.
